Q: What is the main contribution of the RA-DIT algorithm?
Context:
∗Equal contribution

1

RA-DIT: Retrieval-Augmented Dual Instruction Tuning

Figure 1: The RA-DIT approach separately fine-tunes the LLM and the retriever. For a given exam- ple, the LM-ft component updates the LLM to maximize the likelihood of the correct answer given the retrieval-augmented instructions (§2.3); the R-ft component updates the retriever to minimize the KL-Divergence between the retriever score distribution and the LLM preference (§2.4)
